Position: Forzinity received accelerated approval on 19 September 2025 to improve muscle strength in adult and paediatric patients with Barth syndrome weighing at least 30 kg. The catalogue powder is not the authorised product.
A phase 3b/4 confirmatory trial is registered to verify clinical benefit following accelerated approval.
Elamipretide has a positive orphan designation for Barth syndrome; orphan designation is not marketing authorisation.
An agreed paediatric investigation plan was published in March 2026; this is not a United Kingdom marketing authorisation.
Current athlete-specific verification is required before any permitted-status claim.
Regulatory interpretation is blocked because the catalogue does not identify the GLP-1 residue range, terminal form, analogue status or formulation.
No approval or authorised-product-equivalence claim for the supplier GP vial.
No marketing-authorisation claim for the supplier GP vial.
No marketing-authorisation claim for the supplier GP vial.
Current status cannot be finalised before exact molecular identity is established.
